calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Amended OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 514, Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Vicki Mack, CSR: Kathy Kollehner CSR 4102
Petitioner: Christa K. Polley, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Peter James Shark
The Court further grants the petition for Chang of Gender from female to male.
Decree signed in open court.
